steps.title: Track the dates
steps.content: The first sentence says Fuller first performed the Serpentine Dance in 1891. The second sentence describes a film of the dance made in 1896. The relationship is chronological: the film came after the performance.

steps.title: Choose the time transition
steps.content: Choice A signals contrast, Choice B signals a conclusion, and Choice D signals a restatement. The transition needs to show that the 1896 event happened after the 1891 performance. The answer is C.
